creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Example:
https://jenkins.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD_HEAD_i386/192/console

In this case the Jenkins slave (for some odd reason), went offline. These messages should go to jenkins-admin@, or at the very least be flagged as "indeterminate", etc because you don't really know what the end-result would have been had the slave continued to run successfully.

I've seen this issue occur occasionally with the tests2 jobs as well.
